stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at 400 ft and starts to climb to 8 000 ft with an average rate of climb of 500 ft/min. If a constant TAS of 240 kt is maintained during the climb with a headwind component of 45 kt, the aircraft will reach 8 000 ft in (1) _____ and the ground distance covered during the climb will be (2) _____.
